items.description: Create bug form is displayed with title and description input fields when app loads
Bug record is created with status='open' when valid title and description are submitted to the API
API rejects attempt to create bug with invalid status value and does not persist the record
Title input field captures and displays text entered by the user
Description input field captures and displays text entered by the user
Form submission with valid title and description triggers API request and processes without validation errors
Form submission with empty title returns validation error message that names the 'title' field
Form submission with empty description returns validation error message that names the 'description' field
User is redirected to bug detail page at /bugs/{id} after successful bug creation
